name: Profile_R5_NutritionProduct_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.NutritionProduct resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 NutritionProduct resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.NutritionProduct resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 NutritionProduct resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: R5: A code that can identify the detailed nutrients and ingredients in a specific food product (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.code` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Broad product groups or categories used to classify the product, such as Legume and Legume Products, Beverages, or Beef Products (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.category` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.category` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Manufacturer, representative or officially responsible for the product (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.manufacturer` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.manufacturer` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The product's nutritional information expressed by the nutrients (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.nutrient` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.nutrient` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Note: This is a business identifier, not a resource identifier (see [discussion](https://hl7.org/fhir/resource.htm#identifiers)).  It is best practice for the identifier to only appear on a single resource instance, however business practices may occasionally dictate that multiple resource instances with the same identifier can exist - possibly even with different resource types.  For example, multiple Patient and a Person resource instance might share the same social insurance number.

element.short: R5: Ingredients contained in this product (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.ingredient` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.ingredient` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Known or suspected allergens that are a part of this product (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.knownAllergen` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.knownAllergen` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Specifies descriptive properties of the nutrition product (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.characteristic` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.characteristic` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: One or several physical instances or occurrences of the nutrition product (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.instance` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.instance` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Comments made about the product (new)
element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.note` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.note` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `NutritionProduct.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Unknown does not represent "other" - one of the defined statuses must apply.  Unknown is used when the authoring system is not sure what the current status is.
